details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest light-gray Scandinavian 3-seater sofa under 900
Task 2: Home office setup under 800 with conditional removal of most expensive item
Task 3: Book Living Room Makeover video consultation at next available 3 PM slot
Task 4: Create account and favorite small apartment living room article
Task 5: Complete style quiz and add two items of recommended style to cart
Task 6: Configure and save custom walnut shelving design
Task 7: Compare two candidate tables by length and add longer one to cart
Task 8: Request quote for bedroom makeover package
